parsed_question.question_text: These are frames of a video. Measuring from the closest point of each object, which of these objects (pillow, bed, keyboard, cabinet) is the closest to the heater? If there are multiple instances of an object category, measure to the closest. Options: A. pillow B. bed C. keyboard D. cabinet Answer with the option's letter from the given choices directly.
